step_2_image_prompt: Take the persona reference photo as the locked source for her face, hair color and high sleek ponytail styling, body proportions, olive-green cropped athletic pullover, high-waist black leggings, white sneakers, small black crossbody bag, gold huggie hoops, and the entire leafy urban park scene including the gravel path, wooden bench with leather tote, and golden-hour tree canopy — all of these must remain faithful to the reference. She is now holding the Alluvi product in her right hand at hip level in a relaxed pinch grip: her right arm extended naturally down at her side with a slight forward bend at the elbow, wrist relaxed, thumb on the top edge of the box, four fingers along the bottom edge, the box held flat horizontally with the front face angled three-quarters toward the camera. The product is approximately 7 inches wide, sized realistically relative to her hand and hip. Her body and arm posture may shift slightly to make the holding pose look natural and not stamped on. Both hands must remain visible in the frame — her right hand visibly grips the product at hip level, her left hand continues to hold the strap of the crossbody bag at her chest. Do not hide either hand in pockets, behind her back, or crop them out of the frame. The Alluvi product packaging must match the product reference photo exactly — every text element, color, graphic, and certification badge as shown. Preserve the packaging's natural white base color; the scene's golden light should illuminate the white surface as light, not tint the white amber. Match the lighting direction of the persona scene: warm late-afternoon golden-hour sunlight filtered through the tree canopy on her left, with dappled warm light falling across the front face of the box and a soft shadow on its right side.
